title: Patient Summary
description: Generate an International Patient Summary (IPS) — a standardized health record you can share with healthcare providers.
whatIsIpsDetail: An International Patient Summary is a minimal, portable health record following the HL7 FHIR standard (ISO/EN 27269). It contains essential clinical information for cross-border or cross-provider care.

form.namePlaceholder: As it should appear on the summary
form.namePrivacy: Your name is only included in the exported file — it is not stored or sent to our servers.
form.demographicsPrivacy: Demographics are only included in the exported file — not stored on our servers.

preview.title: Summary Preview
preview.noVitalSigns: No vital sign data found in the selected time range.
preview.conditionCount_one: {{count}} clinical condition will be included from your Conditions page.
preview.conditionCount_other: {{count}} clinical conditions will be included from your Conditions page.
preview.noConditions: No clinical conditions recorded. Add conditions on the Conditions page to populate this section.
preview.medicationCount_one: {{count}} medication will be included from your Medications page.
preview.medicationCount_other: {{count}} medications will be included from your Medications page.
preview.noMedications: No medications recorded. Add medications on the Medications page to populate this section.
preview.allergyCount_one: {{count}} allergy or adverse reaction will be included from your Allergies page.
preview.allergyCount_other: {{count}} allergies or adverse reactions will be included from your Allergies page.
preview.noAllergies: No allergies recorded. Add allergies on the Allergies page to populate this section.

export.pdfDescription: Human-readable summary for sharing with providers
